chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-794 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5719/2023 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Irshad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General --------- On the last date of hearing i.e. 07.10.2025, following order was passed: “None is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner. There is also no intimation although the name of learned counsel for the petitioner has appeared in the daily cause list. Same was the position on the previous date as well. As an indulgence and by way of last chance the matter is being adjourned with a note of caution that in the event if counsel for the petitioner fails to appear and proceed with the matter on the next date of hearing, appropriate orders would be passed with the assistance of learned counsel present on that date as well as on the basis of the material available on the record without providing any further opportunity to him.” None is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner even today. No intimation received. It reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE Nadir*
